seo.title: Dog Grooming Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your grooming salon. Route unhappy pet parents to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Dog Grooming
hero.subheading: Pet parents love their dogs and still forget to review. ReviewFlo sends a quick ask after pickup when they are happiest.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Dog Grooming Business Faces

items.heading: A great groom ends with a wagging tail, not a Google click
items.body: Customers are juggling leashes and schedules. Reviews are an afterthought.

items.heading: One bad haircut review mentions the dog by name
items.body: Emotional posts spread fast in local pet groups and on your public profile.

items.heading: Your groomers are focused on animals, not follow-up campaigns
items.body: There is no marketing person tracking who already got an ask.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Dog Groomers

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Strike right after pickup
items.body: Send the link when they pay and praise the cut, not days later.

items.heading: Private space for sensitive complaints
items.body: Worried pet parents can vent to you first.

items.heading: Works for salons and small shops
items.body: Same simple flow whether you have one table or a busy floor.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Will pet parents review a groom?
items.a: Yes, when the ask is easy and hits the moment they are relieved and happy.

items.q: What if someone blames us for a skin issue?
items.a: They can message you privately so you can review notes and respond without a public fight.
Yes. Anyone with the link can send it from a phone or computer.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same idea at a price meant for independent salons.
Yes. Start with one shop link and expand when you need separate tracking.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Dog Grooming Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
